name: student-academic-performance-normalizer
description: Unified React + Express Academic Performance Tracker for Vercel

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend && mkdir -p dist && cp -rn frontend/dist/* dist/ && cp frontend/dist/index.html dist/index.html
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
